name: Velveeta Cheese Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Velveeta cheese, cut into small pieces
1 lb Oleo (melt a little in pan before adding cheese to prevent sticking)
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir powdered sugar and cocoa together until the cocoa is well mixed.
2. Melt the oleo in a pan over low heat, stirring constantly.
3. Add the melted oleo and Velveeta cheese to the sugar-cocoa mixture.
4. When everything is melted and combined, add 1 cup of chopped pecans (or more).
5. Pour the mixture into pans sprayed with Pam.
6. Press the mixture along the edges of the pan.
7. The recipe will fill two cookie sheet pans completely, or you can halve the mixtures if you need less amount.
